basic_details.job_title: OPGC Additional General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Odisha Power Generation Corporation (OPGC) has officially announced the Additional General Manager Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website of OPGC. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 50 years and hold qualifications such as MBA (HR) / PGDBM (HR) / PMIR or a Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Mechanical/Electrical/Civil or equivalent) are eligible to apply for these posts. The application process will be active from the starting date (not specified) and will remain open until 08 July 2026. Direct links to download the offic

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA (HR) / PGDBM (HR) / PMIR or Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Mechanical/Electrical/Civil or equivalent)
qualification.details: Additional General Manager – HR & IR: MBA (HR) / PGDBM (HR) / PMIR from recognized College / University. Additional General Manager - Engineering: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Mechanical/Electrical/Civil or equivalent) from recognized College / University.

salary_details.details: Additional General Manager – HR & IR: Rs. 22,00,000/- Per Annum Additional General Manager - Engineering: Rs. 22,00,000/- Per Annum

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the OPGC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of OPGC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.odisha_power_generation_corporation_opgc: MBA (HR) / PGDBM (HR) / PMIR or Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Mechanical/Electrical/Civil or equivalent)

content_sections.heading: OPGC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OPGC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download OPGC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OPGC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Additional General Manager – HR & IR: MBA (HR) / PGDBM (HR) / PMIR from recognized College / University. Additional General Manager - Engineering: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Mechanical/Electrical/Civil or equivalent) from recognized College / University.

content_sections.heading: OPGC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: OPGC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Additional General Manager – HR & IR: Rs. 22,00,000/- Per Annum Additional General Manager - Engineering: Rs. 22,00,000/- Per Annum

rows.event: Opening of online submission of application
Last date of submission of online application
Last date for receipt of hard copy of application along with requisite documents

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the OPGC Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of OPGC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OPGC Additional General Manager posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the OPGC Additional General Manager recruitment is 08th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Additional General Manager post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Additional General Manager positions in the Odisha Power Generation Corporation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Additional General Manager - HR & IR post?
faq.answer: For the Additional General Manager - HR & IR post, candidates need to possess an MBA (HR) / PGDBM (HR) / PMIR from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Additional General Manager posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Additional General Manager posts is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Additional General Manager positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Additional General Manager posts will receive a salary of Rs. 22,00,000/- Per Annum.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for OPGC recruitment is strictly online through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the OPGC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the notification, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Additional General Manager posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Additional General Manager posts will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the OPGC located?
faq.answer: OPGC is located in Odisha, with its head office likely in Bhubaneswar, Odisha.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of OPGC?
faq.answer: The official website of Odisha Power Generation Corporation is www.opgc.co.in.
